objective: Remove first-match-only default candidate generation, enumerate all supported fresh safe defects, emit candidate/refusal metrics, and keep candidate ids stable under identical source and ledger hashes.

candidate_metrics.candidate_defect_coverage: emitted by candidate_generator.metrics; synthetic supported fixture asserts 1.0

refusal_metrics.unsupported_safe_defect_behavior: unsupported safe defects emit unsupported_candidate_family refusal instead of disappearing

implemented_behaviors: Default candidate generation iterates every safe_candidate defect instead of returning after the first supported target.
Supported fresh safe defects with bounded coordinate-offset operations emit one candidate each in the default path.
Candidate manifests include panel, subregion, edit_family, family, source_defect with ledger_hash, source_hash, selector.source_hash, variant_id, variant, and candidate_hash.
Candidate ids are assigned after deterministic sorting and remain stable under identical source and ledger hashes.
Unsupported safe defects produce explicit unsupported_candidate_family refusals.
Actionability gaps and per-defect source hash mismatches produce explicit refusals and no operation.
Candidate metrics expose candidate/refusal coverage denominators required by the Phase 2 spec.

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_candidate_generator.py -k "multi_candidate or unsupported_safe_defect or stable_ids or source_hash_mismatch"
tests.red_result_before_implementation: failed for first-match-only and source-hash fail-open behavior

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_quality_defect_ledger.py tests/test_candidate_generator.py tests/test_candidate_families.py

uv run ruff check tests/test_quality_defect_ledger.py tests/test_candidate_generator.py tests/test_candidate_families.py scripts/quality/quality_defect_ledger.py scripts/candidates/candidate_generator.py scripts/candidates/candidate_families.py
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/quality/quality_defect_ledger.py scripts/candidates/candidate_generator.py scripts/candidates/candidate_families.py

adversarial_verification.summary: No blocking findings. Reviewer verified multi-candidate iteration, metrics, required metadata, stable sort and ids, explicit refusals, source hash mismatch blocking, and retained path/symlink protections.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.
rg --files -g 'check-no-excuse-rules.py' returned no matching script in this repository.
